case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. JAMES E JONES

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, JAMES E SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-04-2017
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-23-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF BRYANT BURNSTAD REQUESTING THAT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING REGARDING SANCTIONS FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE BE CONTINUED, AND ALL SANCTION ORDERS BE SET ASIDE. (TRANSACTION ID # 60580251) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-23-2017 CONTINUED TO AUG-22-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE MAY-23-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 60995038)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-22-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
